name: Backlund
description: The grand capital of the Loen Kingdom. A city of fog and secrets where countless Beyonders walk the streets.
events: You find a discarded letter in the fog — it contains hints about a nearby Beyonder gathering.
A street vendor offers you a strange trinket. You sense Beyonder energy from it.
The fog thickens and you briefly glimpse a figure in a top hat watching you from a rooftop.
You overhear two men in cloaks discussing a secret meeting at the Tarot Club.
A constable tips you off about unusual supernatural activity in the East Borough.

name: East Borough, Backlund
description: The dark underbelly of Backlund, where the poor and desperate eke out a living alongside petty criminals and low-level Beyonders.
events: You find a crumpled potion formula discarded behind a tavern.
A desperate thug tries to rob you but flees when you show your abilities.
A child slips something into your pocket — a small sealed vial with strange properties.
You witness a back-alley fight between two low-level Beyonders.
An old woman mutters a warning about 'the ones who watch from the fog.'

name: Loen Countryside
description: Rolling hills and misty moorlands of the Loen Kingdom. Ancient ruins and forgotten graves dot the landscape.
events: You discover the ruins of an old church, its walls covered in faded murals.
A lone traveler warns you about a creature seen lurking in the eastern fields.
You find a buried chest containing old Loen coins and a partial potion recipe.
The ghost of a farmer approaches you, pleading for help settling their affairs.
You stumble upon evidence of a werewolf transformation — tracks and torn clothing.

name: Tingen City
description: A mid-sized city in southern Loen, known for its textile mills and its unusual number of disappearances.
events: Workers at the textile mill report hearing voices coming from the machines at night.
You find a pamphlet from the Eternal Blazing Sun Church warning of dark activity.
A suspicious man in red watches you from across the street before slipping away.
You discover a hidden shrine to the God of Calamity in a cellar.
A detective approaches you, needing help investigating a string of strange deaths.

name: Feynapotter
description: A northern city near the Hornacis mountain range, known for its fog and mysterious disappearances near the mountains.
events: Locals whisper about lights seen moving on the mountain at night.
A scholar presents you with a fragment of pre-Fourth Epoch text.
You find a cave entrance that seems to lead deep into the Hornacis range.
Strange symbols have been carved into trees along the northern road.
A mountain guide tells you the fog here is different — older, more aware.

name: Rouen, Intis Republic
description: The sophisticated capital of the Intis Republic, renowned for art, culture, and a thriving underground Beyonder community.
events: A masked figure passes you a card — it's an invitation to an underground Beyonder auction.
You witness an assassination attempt on a Republic official, blocked by invisible forces.
A Beyonder art dealer offers to sell you a painting that seems to move when unobserved.
Rumors spread about a secret gathering of high-level Beyonders in the catacombs.
An Intis intelligence agent approaches you about a mutual threat.

name: Hornacis Mountains
description: The ancient, fog-shrouded mountains where primordial forces still hold sway. Extremely dangerous for low-level Beyonders.
events: You find an entrance to a pre-Third Epoch ruin, partially consumed by the mountain.
A fragment of an ancient god's will touches your mind — overwhelming but enlightening.
You discover a cache of powerful artifacts from a long-dead Beyonder explorer.
The mountains seem to whisper in an ancient language you almost understand.
A demigod fragment approaches — it wants to make a deal.

name: The Deep Sea
description: The terrifying depths of the ocean where Chaos reigns supreme and ancient leviathans sleep.
events: Something massive moves beneath you — you sense its consciousness briefly touch yours.
You find a sunken ship from the Second Epoch, its cargo impossibly preserved.
Chaos energy crystallizes around you, offering dangerous power if you dare touch it.
An ancient mermaid being offers you forbidden knowledge in exchange for a service.
You encounter a sealed artifact floating in the deep — its power is immense and terrifying.
